title: Write ERD and Object Views Tutorial Documentation
description:
Create a WordPress tutorial for the DataTools ERD and Object Views feature. Published at the tutorials section of the DataTools Pro website.

Tutorial URL: https://datatoolspro.com/tutorials/data-tools-erd-and-object-views/
acceptance_criteria: Tutorial published on WordPress at the specified URL

Tutorial is accessible from the tutorials navigation
implementation_notes: Documentation task — tutorial written and published on WordPress.
